name: Spaghetti with Bacon Sauce Kjcd19b
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, grated (up to 3/4 cup)
1/8 teaspoon Hot pepper flakes or cayenne
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook bacon until crisp.
2. Add olive oil and hot pepper flakes; continue cooking for a few minutes.
3. Add chopped green onions and cook until tender.
4. Remove from heat.
5. In a serving bowl, mix in beaten eggs.
6. Pour the bacon mixture over spaghetti; toss to combine.
7. Toss in grated Parmesan cheese.
